goal: Move Workers AI permit enrichment from the consuming app's post-hoc permit_tags D1 table into the SF DBI ingestion pipeline, materializing AI-derived tags + extractions as first-class enrich_* fields on the sf_dbi warehouse records, then repoint and retire the app-side enrichment surfaces.

owners.pipeline_repo: ingestion-pipeline Worker team (Phase A, via PROMPT.md)

required_reading: mcp:cloudflare-docs (verify Workers AI batch API, Queues/Workflows, Iceberg schema evolution)
rules: Do not start any app-side phase (B-D) until Phase A delivers the hand-off contract (column names/types, on-table vs sidecar, enrich_version, R2 SQL notes).
Phases B and C are reversible; Phase D (dropping permit_tags/enrichment_runs) is gated on a verified coverage report.
Keep enriched column names in ONE place (data-platform/schema-data.ts) and reference it everywhere; never scatter hard-coded names.
All /api/* routes stay zod-openapi typed; preserve existing response shapes when repointing reads.
Run pnpm cf-typegen after binding/var changes; pnpm lint + tsc green before deploy.
Respect R2 SQL guardrails (read-only, LIMIT, no OFFSET/window/func(DISTINCT)).
status_protocol: Set status to in_progress when starting a task and done when its acceptance criteria pass. Leave blocked tasks as todo with a note.

tasks.title: Implement enrichment in the ingestion pipeline
tasks.description: Per PROMPT.md: per-permit Workers AI structured extraction (kimi-k2.6 / gpt-oss-120b swappable via MODEL_TAGGER), batch queue API, parse choices[0].message.content defensively, materialize enrich_* fields on sf_dbi (or a permit_enrichment sidecar). Incremental + idempotent via enrich_content_hash + enrich_version.
acceptance: Fresh load populates enrich_* for new/changed permits
Unchanged rows are NOT re-called (verified via counts)
WHERE enrich_is_adu = true returns sensible rows via R2 SQL
Backfill of ~548k rows is resumable and rate-limit safe
20-permit spot check shows accurate non-empty tags/summaries

tasks.title: Deliver hand-off contract to the app team
tasks.description: Report exact column names + types (or sidecar table shape + join key), on-table vs sidecar decision, enrich_version value + 'is enriched yet' query, and any R2 SQL gotchas for enriched fields (esp. JSON-array filtering).
acceptance: App team has the column/table contract written down in this folder

tasks.title: Register enrich_* columns in the app schema description
tasks.description: Add the enriched fields to src/backend/data-platform/schema-data.ts and docs/cslb-schema.json so R2 SQL typing and the agent's describe_schema tool know about them.
acceptance: describe_schema surfaces enrich_* columns
R2 SQL queries referencing them validate

tasks.title: Repoint find_permits_by_tag to query enriched columns (dual-read)
tasks.description: Replace the permitTags D1 select in src/backend/ai/agents/storyteller/tools.ts:202 with an R2 SQL query over enrich_scope_tags / scalar enrich_* via runBlockQuery, falling back to permit_tags when a permit isn't enriched yet.
acceptance: find_permits_by_tag returns >= parity vs old D1 path on sample categories
Falls back gracefully for unenriched permits

tasks.title: Repoint named queries + add scalar-field queries
tasks.description: Rewrite nq_permits_by_tag (templates.ts:115) to filter sf_dbi on enrich_* columns (or join the sidecar). Add nq_permits_red_flags, nq_adu_permits, nq_post_disaster_permits, etc. Verify store.ts bindParams *_list passthrough still works for IN(...).
acceptance: New named queries run green via run-block on live R2 SQL
bindParams list passthrough covered by a test

tasks.title: Repoint /api/permit-tags reads to be column-backed
tasks.description: Back permitTagsRouter (GET /api/permit-tags, /api/permit-tags/categories) with R2 SQL over enrich_* columns while preserving the existing {category,count}[] and list response shapes.
acceptance: /api/permit-tags/categories returns column-backed {category,count}[]
No client-visible response-shape change

tasks.title: Repoint + extend storyteller frontend filters
tasks.description: Source tag-filter options from the column-backed /api/permit-tags/categories and add first-class scalar filters (ADU, red-flag, post-disaster, historic review, solar, panel upgrade).
acceptance: Filters populate from live data
Scalar enrich filters apply and refetch with skeletons

tasks.title: Deprecate app-side AI tagging endpoints
tasks.description: Return 410 Gone from POST /api/enrich/sync, /api/enrich/batch, GET /api/enrich/poll for one release; remove any admin/storyteller entry points that triggered them. Stop writing permit_tags / enrichment_runs.
acceptance: Write endpoints return 410
No new permit_tags rows are written

tasks.title: Coverage report gate
tasks.description: Produce count(enrich_updated_at is not null)/count(*) over sf_dbi and confirm enriched coverage >= parity with permit_tags. This gates Phase D.
files: (diagnostics route or one-off R2 SQL query)
acceptance: Coverage report shows enriched >= prior tag coverage on the categories the app uses

tasks.title: Remove dual-read fallback + app-side tagger
tasks.description: Delete src/backend/ai/providers/permit-tagger.ts, the enrichRouter, and the permit_tags dual-read fallback in find_permits_by_tag / named queries.
acceptance: tsc + lint green with the modules removed
No remaining permitTags references except the read repoint

tasks.title: Drop enrichment tables + config
tasks.description: Drizzle migration dropping permit_tags + enrichment_runs; remove src/backend/db/schemas/enrichment/* and the schema.ts:29 re-export; remove MODEL_TAGGER from wrangler.jsonc. Run pnpm db:generate + cf-typegen.
acceptance: Migration generated + applied (migrate:remote)
cf-typegen clean
build green

tasks.title: Docs + deploy
tasks.description: Update AGENTS.md (enrichment now pipeline-owned; document enrich_* columns + query patterns), annotate docs/0002 enrichment refs, deploy, verify /storyteller filters live, git push.
acceptance: AGENTS.md reflects pipeline ownership
Deployed + live filters verified
Pushed to origin main
